_about: Single source of truth for the UKB forward-pipeline physical / simulation parameters
_comment_membrane: Membrane capacitance C_m (mF) and surface-to-volume ratio A_m (cm^-1)
_comment_ms_kinetics: Mitchell-Schaeffer kinetics (ms) and normalised gate voltage
_comment_region_sizing: expand_layer_biv layer fractions (0-1) splitting the wall into endo/mid/epi
_comment_time: Time integration. dt_ms is the shared PDE/ODE step. t_end is different for different experiments
